notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio singles on a ground ball to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. Mickey Gasper to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Isiah Kiner-Falefa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Isiah Kiner-Falefa grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Andruw Monasterio out at 2nd. Isiah Kiner-Falefa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Isiah Kiner-Falefa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isiah Kiner-Falefa grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Andruw Monasterio out at 2nd. Isiah Kiner-Falefa out at 1st.
